ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "covid_vaccination" TEXT /* COVID-19 vaccination status (YES/NO) */,
  "driving_license" TEXT /* Driving license status (YES/NO) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the driver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the driver */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the driver was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the driver was terminated, if applicable */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the driver (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number of the driver */,
  "driving_license_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the driving license */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date of the last vaccination */,
  "next_vaccination_due" TEXT /* Date when the next vaccination is due */,
  "medical_clearance" TEXT /* Medical clearance status (YES/NO) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the driver belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the driver */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Training status (completed, in progress, not started) */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Performance rating of the driver */,
  "last_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last performance review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "driver_id" TEXT /* ID of the driver assigned to the route */,
  "route_id" TEXT /* ID of the route the driver is assigned to */,
  "vehicle_id" TEXT /* ID of the vehicle the driver is assigned to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assignment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "assigned_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who assigned the driver */,
  "assignment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the assignment */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Performance rating of the driver for the assignment */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the supervisor or manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_assignments_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_assignments_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_assignments_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Starting location of the route */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* Ending location of the route */,
  "distance" REAL /* Total distance of the route in kilometers */,
  "estimated_time" TEXT /* Estimated time to complete the route */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of the route (e.g., urban, rural, interstate) */,
  "route_complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the route (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "scheduled_days" TEXT /* Days when the route is scheduled */,
  "route_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the route (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the route */,
  "route_status" TEXT /* Status of the route (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle (e.g., truck, van, car) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the vehicle in terms of passengers or cargo */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the vehicle (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, manager, operational staff) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "role_id" TEXT /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
